ability.skill.electromaster.arc_gen.desc: Arouse a weak electrical arc, which causes slight damage on the area it hits. If it directly hits a flammable block, it will have a chance to ignite it.
ability.skill.electromaster.body_intensi: Fine-tune your bioelectricity to improve your physical ability for a short duration.
ability.skill.electromaster.current_char: Channel electricity into energy blocks or held energy items while holding.
ability.skill.electromaster.mag_manip.de: Manipulate and move magnetizable things with the magnetic force, even throw them out to damage enemies.
ability.skill.electromaster.mag_movement: Generate a strong magnetic field and pull yourself towards some magnetic target. Extremely useful when moving or escaping.
Close your eyes and feel the flow of magnetism, allowing you to see a hint of precious mineral resources around you.
ability.skill.electromaster.railgun.desc: Shoot the coin out at a high speed with electromagnetic induction. Cause destructive damage where it impacts.
ability.skill.electromaster.thunder_bolt: Compress an enormous amount of electricity into a powerful bolt, bursting out and damaging anything in its area.
ability.skill.electromaster.thunder_clap: Manipulate the magnetic field in the atmosphere to create thunderclouds, and guide the electricity down to cause a devastating strike of lightning.
ability.skill.generic.brain_course.desc: Undergo focused neural training to raise your maximum CP by 1000.
ability.skill.generic.brain_course_advan: Deepen your neural development to raise maximum CP by 1500 and maximum overload by 100.
ability.skill.generic.mind_course.desc: Train your mental composure so CP recovers 20% faster.
ability.skill.meltdowner.electron_bomb.d: Pull together a small amount of electrons to generate a threatening beam.
ability.skill.meltdowner.electron_missil: Hold together a HUGE amount of electrons in a cloud and use some of it to attack each time.
ability.skill.meltdowner.jet_engine.desc: Use the propulsive force of electrons to launch yourself into the air. Will generate a light-shield to protect yourself in the flight.
ability.skill.meltdowner.light_shield.de: Forms electrons into a shield. High-speed moving electrons will destroy anything that attacks you, and damage anything that touches you closely.
ability.skill.meltdowner.meltdowner.desc: Extreme high-energy electron beam that melts down walls and metals.
After a long time of practice, you can make your electron beam suitable for harvesting minerals without destroying them.
ability.skill.meltdowner.mine_ray_expert: With understanding of how to control the intensity of electrons better, you can now harvest mineral resources more efficiently.
ability.skill.meltdowner.mine_ray_luck.d: After a long time of practice, you can almost harvest the useful resources in the ore perfectly.
ability.skill.meltdowner.rad_intensify.d: Because of the high-intensity radiation, the target hit by beam is doubly vulnerable to attacks for a few seconds.
ability.skill.meltdowner.ray_barrage.des: Shoot your high-energy ray at a Silicon Barn to scatter it into a ray barrage that destroys everything in front of you.
ability.skill.meltdowner.scatter_bomb.de: Manipulate more than one electronics group to attack. As a result, you cannot control the impact point accurately.
ability.skill.teleporter.dim_folding_the: Exploit weak spatial folding during teleportation attacks to split space unpredictably and amplify the final hit.
ability.skill.teleporter.flashing.desc: Use multiple teleportations in a short time to maneuver through the air.
ability.skill.teleporter.flesh_ripping.d: Rip apart your enemy's inside and inflict gory damage. The over-bloody effect may make you feel uncomfortable.
ability.skill.teleporter.location_telepo: Memorize your current location and teleport back from anywhere far away afterwards.
ability.skill.teleporter.mark_teleport.d: Mark where you are looking at as the destination, and teleport yourself there.
ability.skill.teleporter.penetrate_telep: Derive the thickness of an obstacle in front of you, and teleport straight through it.
Teleport a block by shifting its coordinates. The space-folding phenomenon will hurt any entity on the teleportation path.
ability.skill.teleporter.space_fluct.des: Refine unstable spatial resonance so teleportation attacks can escalate into higher-order critical splits.
ability.skill.teleporter.threatening_tel: Teleport items to somewhere around you. Sometimes just a small fragment is able to kill an enemy.
Stir the blood flow of organic enemies, making their vessel burst and die in extreme pain.
ability.skill.vecmanip.directed_blastwav: Triple the force of punching into the object, making it extremely destructive. Will break blocks on area it hits.
ability.skill.vecmanip.directed_shock.de: Seize the counterforce when punched into an object and redirect it onto the object itself, making the punch more powerful.
ability.skill.vecmanip.groundshock.desc: Apply a powerful shock on the ground and direct it forward, which breaks the ground and launches enemies into the air.
ability.skill.vecmanip.plasma_cannon.des: Manipulate a large area of air flow with extreme precision to form a plasma body. Throw it out to cause a disastrous explosion.
ability.skill.vecmanip.storm_wing.desc: Manipulate the velocity of air to form four micro-whirlwinds at your back, and fly in high speed using forces they generate. Will break blocks nearby if inexperienced.
ability.skill.vecmanip.vec_accel.desc: Boost jumping force for an instant to accelerate yourself.
ability.skill.vecmanip.vec_deviation.des: Cancel the velocity of projectiles flying towards you, and cancel a portion of combat damage.
ability.skill.vecmanip.vec_reflection.de: Reflect the dangerous incoming attacks towards your line of sight, and make your opponent bear it.
ability_interf.my_mod.cantuse: You can't use this interference block.
app.my_mod.freq_transmitter.e0: The wireless matrix is not initialized.
app.my_mod.freq_transmitter.e2: Link failed. Perhaps the matrix has reached its capacity or the signal is out of range.
app.my_mod.freq_transmitter.e3: Link failed. Perhaps the node has reached its capacity or the signal is out of range.
app.my_mod.freq_transmitter.name: Frequency Transmitter
app.my_mod.freq_transmitter.s0_0: Please right-click a wireless matrix or node to start establish link from.
app.my_mod.freq_transmitter.s2_0: Right click any wireless node nearby to establish link. Click any other blocks to quit.
app.my_mod.freq_transmitter.s3_0: Right click any wireless receiver or generator nearby to esablish link. Click any other blocks to quit.
cat_engine.my_mod.linked: Linked to the node named %s meow~
cat_engine.my_mod.notfound: Didn't found any node nearby meow~
command.academy.aim.help: Available commands: cat, catlist, reset, learn, unlearn, learn_all, learned, nodes, level, exp, fullcp, cd_clear, maxout, help, cheats_on, cheats_off
config.my_mod.matrix.capacity-per-core-l: Connected node capacity granted by each matrix core level. (default=8)
config.my_mod.network.buffer-max: Maximum transit buffer stored by a wireless network. (default=2000.0)
config.my_mod.network.update-interval-ti: Ticks between wireless network energy balance passes. (default=40)
config.my_mod.node.advanced.range: Advanced node wireless range in blocks. (default=19.0)
config.my_mod.node.basic.range: Basic node wireless range in blocks. (default=9.0)
config.my_mod.node.standard.range: Standard node wireless range in blocks. (default=12.0)
config.my_mod.performance.matrix-gui-syn: Ticks between matrix GUI sync broadcasts. (default=15)
config.my_mod.performance.node-sync-inte: Ticks between node network check and GUI sync passes. (default=20)
config.my_mod.performance.stale-device-c: Ticks before a stale wireless device (capability gone) is removed from a connection. (default=20)
config.my_mod.performance.sweep-interval: Ticks between periodic sweeps unregistering disposed networks/connections. (default=600)
config.my_mod.performance.validate-inter: Ticks between node-connection integrity validation passes. (default=20)
config.my_mod.performance.world-load-reb: Max networks/connections rebuilt from NBT per tick after world load; the rest queue across subsequent ticks instead of rebuilding the whole topology in one tick. (default=200)
config.my_mod.search.max-results: Maximum results returned by wireless range searches. (default=100)
config.my_mod.search.node-search-range: Search radius for generators/receivers querying nearby nodes. (default=20.0)

Ability level must be at least 3, and an Induction Factor must be in inventory.
skill_tree.my_mod.console.reset_fail_dev: Can't reset ability -- Advance Developer must be used.\n
skill_tree.my_mod.console.reset_fail_oth: Can't reset ability -- either level is lower than 3 or induction factor not detected.\n
